race.comment: The well-related MERCURIAL LADY (1) (half to G1 winner Cool Archie) is a former Victorian who has been right there in both runs since joining the new stable and will be ready to peak now third-up from the spell. Should be right there when the judge calls a halt. DIVINE SOURCE (6) loves racing here at the Ipswich circuit with two wins and a second from just three attempts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Should prove tough to hold out. POCKETMONEY (2) strips fitter second-up from the break and gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim. Top-three aspirations. EASY LOVE (4) is a stayer resuming who is sure to be hitting the line with gusto. TAKE ACHANCE ON ME (8) next best out of the champion Waller barn.
